label: BEST_BALANCED
rationale: Best statistical significance: t-stat=2.21, MDD only -17.5%, full PnL +65.5%. ATR-scaled TP=2×ATR, SL=1.5×ATR.

label: BEST_TOTAL_PNL
rationale: Highest total PnL with reasonable t-stat (1.20). Chandelier trail = highest_high - 3.5×ATR. Lets winners run.

label: HYBRID_SAFE
rationale: Hybrid: tight initial SL (1×ATR), then Chandelier trail (2.5×ATR) lets winners run. t-stat 1.08, lower DD -12.2%.

label: DIVERGENCE_ATR
rationale: Divergence strategy + Chandelier exit. 90 trades (highest), EV +0.67%. Lets divergence-driven runs extend naturally.

label: XRP_DIVERSIFIER
rationale: XRP diversifier. Breakout + hybrid exit (initial SL 1.5×ATR + Chandelier 2.5×ATR + TP cap 3×ATR). Adds asset diversification.
